texto: The only time I want someone's opinion is when I ask for it. Reason why I don't ask for anyone's opinion nowadays is because they are too afraid, they always cover the truth with a lie, which is something I hate tremendously. When I ask for your opinion; I want full brutal honesty, face on, outright! Not a lot of people can do that, which is sad, very sad indeed...
explicacao: Citação de Nisa Jolly sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The only time I want someone's opinion is when I ask for it.
